svg.title: SAFe framework mapped to EU AI Act governance needs
svg.desc: A three-tier structural diagram showing how SAFe's Portfolio, ART and Team layers each carry specific EU AI Act obligations, with key ceremonies and roles annotated at each level.

g.text: SAFe as EU AI Act compliance backbone

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SAFe Lean Portfolio Management handle EU AI Act compliance?')

sendPrompt('How does the VMO enforce continuous compliance in SAFe?')

sendPrompt('How does Inspect and Adapt handle post-market monitoring?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of System Demo in AI Act compliance?')

svg.text: Click any node to explore deeper. SAFe Lean Governance = VMO + LACE + Portfolio Leadership.
